text: Walking through this space, I sense structure and silence intertwined. The angled walls and clinical lighting create a kind of introspective detachment—an environment both expectant and empty. Soon, the colorful R+D wall greets me with energy and curiosity. There is a shift; the vibrant graphics and interactive displays evoke excitement and thoughtfulness. Here, I am prompted to reflect on research, progress, and humanity’s evolving dialogue with technology. In both scenes, I feel like an observer, attentive and open to possibility, quietly questioning my purpose in these contrasting, carefully curated environments.
